DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE HIGHWAY & TRANSPORTATION DISTRICT
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ENVELOPE STAMPED, "RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD" COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT XIE, TONG LE

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FILED. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF; NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL. CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA. NOT REPORTED (D-506).
